scenario.name: reg_b2_04_register_keepalive
scenario.send: REGISTER sip:[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=z9hG4bK[callId] From: <sip:34020000001320000001@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTagB204[callNumber] To: <sip:34020000001320000001@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] REGISTER Contact: <sip:34020000001320000001@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Max-Forwards: 70 User-Agent: WVP-Test-Simulator-B204 Expires: 3600 X-GB-ver: 2.0

REGISTER sip:[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=z9hG4bK[callId] From: <sip:34020000001320000001@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTagB204[callNumber] To: <sip:34020000001320000001@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] REGISTER Contact: <sip:34020000001320000001@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Authorization: [authentication username=34020000001320000001 password=test12345] Max-Forwards: 70 User-Agent: WVP-Test-Simulator-B204 Expires: 3600 X-GB-ver: 2.0

MESSAGE sip:[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=z9hG4bK[callId]keep From: <sip:34020000001320000001@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTagB204k[callNumber] To: <sip:34020000002000000001@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id]-keep CSeq: 1 MESSAGE Contact: <sip:34020000001320000001@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Max-Forwards: 70 User-Agent: WVP-Test-Simulator-B204 Content-Type: Application/MANSCDP+xml Content-Length: [len]
<?xml version="1.0"?> <Notify> <CmdType>Keepalive</CmdType> <SN>1</SN> <DeviceID>34020000001320000001</DeviceID> <Status>OK</Status> </Notify>
